title: Remove abandoned dark-launch feature flag code
description: Removes the experimental dark-launch feature that was never enabled and has been abandoned for 8 months. The feature flag 'dark_launch_v2' was never turned on.
diff:
diff --git a/features/dark_launch.py b/features/dark_launch.py
deleted file mode 100644
index 0000000..f9a0b1c
--- a/features/dark_launch.py
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,15 +0,0 @@
-from __future__ import annotations
-
-def dark_launch_handler(request):
-    '''Shadow traffic handler - never activated.'''
-    pass
comments: karl: Dead code removal. Approve and close this cleanup.
lily: Confirmed the flag was never enabled. Close as completed cleanup.
author: mike
